Your Local Pest Control Experts

Welcome to Bugnix

Bugnix is here to help you take back control of your home. We offer a range of pest control services to tackle any infestation, from rats, mice, and ants to bedbugs, fleas, cockroaches, and squirrels. Our team is dedicated to providing effective solutions to keep your home pest-free.
